nasb.text: Therefore when the people saw the sign which He had performed, they said, “This is truly the Prophet who is to come into the world.”

esv.text: When the people saw the sign that he had done, they said, “This is indeed the Prophet who is to come into the world!”

cnv.text: 眾人看見耶穌所行的神蹟，就說：“這真是那要到世上來的先知。”

ccb.text: 大家看见耶稣行的这个神迹，都说：“这人真是那位要来到世上的先知！”

csbs.text: 众人看见耶稣所行的神迹，就说：“这个人确实是那位要来到世上的先知！”
